notes: P3-b: Items Master unified — قائمة الأصناف | الاعتمادات | سجل الصور | الاستيراد in a single tabbed page (/boxes/items?tab=...).
Old paths (/admin/item-approvals, /boxes/items/import, /boxes/items-image-history) now redirect to the new tabs.
No business logic changes; underlying create/update/import flows unchanged.
